statement: In every magma, Equation 1603 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (x * x))`) implies Equation 1431 (`x = (x * x) * (y * (x * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0333
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op x x)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x x) (op y (op x x)))
